languages.text: {n}Стоящие перед вами люди выглядят изнуренными. Мешки под глазами, резкие движения, все говорит о том, что они на грани.{/n}
{n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Стоящие перед вами люди выглядят изнуренными. Мешки под глазами, резкие движения, все говорит о том, что они на грани.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The men before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes, their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of beings pushed to the very brink.{/n}
{n}The men before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes, their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of beings pushed to the very brink.{/n}
{n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}
{n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}

languages.text: {n}站在你面前的那些人，看着已是筋疲力尽。他们的眼眶乌黑，动作慌乱又神经质。种种迹象都说明，他们已经被逼到了崩溃边缘。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}站在你面前的那些人，看着已是筋疲力尽。他们的眼眶乌黑，动作慌乱又神经质。种种迹象都说明，他们已经被逼到了崩溃边缘。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Karşında duranlar tamamen tükenmiş görünüyor. Gözlerinin altı morarmış, hareketleri gergin ve telaşlı. Her işaret, uçuruma sürüklenmiş insanları anlatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Karşında duranlar tamamen tükenmiş görünüyor. Gözlerinin altı morarmış, hareketleri gergin ve telaşlı. Her işaret, uçuruma sürüklenmiş insanları anlatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens qui se tiennent devant vous semblent à bout de forces. De leurs yeux cernés de noir à leurs mouvements fébriles, tout indique qu'ils sont à la limite de ce qu'ils peuvent endurer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les Meroviens qui se tiennent devant vous semblent à bout de forces. De leurs yeux cernés de noir à leurs mouvements fébriles, tout indique qu'ils sont à la limite de ce qu'ils peuvent endurer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las personas ante ti parecen absolutamente agotadas. Tienen bolsas negras bajo los ojos y sus movimientos son nerviosos y frenéticos. Todo indica que han llegado a su límite.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las personas ante ti parecen absolutamente agotadas. Tienen bolsas negras bajo los ojos y sus movimientos son nerviosos y frenéticos. Todo indica que han llegado a su límite.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Leute vor dir sehen erschöpft aus. Sie haben dunkle Ringe unter den Augen, und ihre Bewegungen sind fahrig und hektisch. Sie scheinen am Ende ihrer Kräfte zu sein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Leute vor dir sehen erschöpft aus. Sie haben dunkle Ringe unter den Augen, und ihre Bewegungen sind fahrig und hektisch. Sie scheinen am Ende ihrer Kräfte zu sein.{/n}

languages.text: {n}目の前の者は、完全に疲れ切った様子だ。目の周りはクマで、動きはぎこちなく、慌てふためいている。あらゆる兆候が、限界まで追い詰められた人々を物語っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those standing before you look utterly spent. Dark circles ring their eyes and their movements are jittery and frantic. Every sign speaks of people pushed to the very brink.{/n}
